info.name: Finance Backend API
info.description:
## Finance Backend API

This collection covers the core backend API endpoints for a Finance application. It is organized around three main functional areas:

### Authentication
- **Login** — Authenticate users and obtain access tokens required for secured endpoints.

### User Management
- **Create Users** — Register new users in the system.
- **Get All Users** — Retrieve a paginated list of all registered users.
- **Activate / Deactivate User** — Toggle the active status of a specific user by their ID.

### Financial Records
- **Create Records** — Add new financial records to the system.
- **Get All Records** — Retrieve financial records with pagination support.
- **Update a Record** — Modify an existing financial record by ID.
- **Delete Record by ID** — Remove a specific financial record from the system.

### Dashboard
- **Dashboard Summary** — Fetch an aggregated summary of financial data for display on the application dashboard.

---

All requests are built against a configurable `{{baseURL}}` environment variable, making it straightforward to switch between development, staging, and production environments.
